title: Iceikelies
description:
A mod that aims to bring more uses to ice with the end goal of making the philosopher's stone.

In total you need 387420489 blocks of ice to make a philosopher's stone.
body:
Iceikelies (pronounced Eye-sek-lees) is a mod that aims to bring more uses to ice, with the end goal of producing the philosopher's stone, a vessel for the power of the philosopher. It also adds items such as a new set of tools that are a lot stronger than iron, several more layers of ice and the new permafrost grass and dirt.

This mod is for people who like ice, but want more uses for it.

In every update I will try to add a signifigent amount of content but don't hold me to that promise

This mod should work with any computer as it is not very big, but that might change in the future

To download: press download, go into your minecraft files, go to 'mods' and put it there.

Made with MCreator
